item.title: 8 Vehicle Buying Red Flags to Watch For
item.description: Learn 8 situations where buying a vehicle may not be the right move, with practical advice for smarter car shopping and ownership decisions.

media:content.media:title: 8 Vehicle Buying Red Flags to Watch For
media:content.media:description: Learn 8 situations where buying a vehicle may not be the right move, with practical advice for smarter car shopping and ownership decisions.

item.title: 1995 Miata Repair Mistake Explained

item.title: Lexus GX 460 Ride Comfort Issue

item.title: Coffee Spill Repair Costs
item.description: A small coffee spill can lead to a surprisingly large repair bill. This video highlights the real-world cost of interior damage and cleanup.

item.title: Why a $3 Part Can Cost $2,000 to Fix
item.description: A look at how a cheap part can lead to a much bigger repair bill, with practical insight into diagnostics, labor, and repair costs.
